research_question: Does a fixed abnormal trading-activity shock identify short-term market-relative A-share declines that subsequently reverse after costs, beyond the matched unconditioned comparator?
null_hypothesis: For either shock-conditioned variant in either frozen historical split, net performance does not exceed both 510300.SH and its matched unconditioned comparator after multiplicity control, or another mandatory gate fails.

capital_and_execution.weighting: equal weight across exactly 15 selected names
capital_and_execution.rebalance: monthly at the final accepted session of each calendar month
capital_and_execution.exit_and_holding: hold until the next scheduled monthly D+1 open rebalance; blocked exits remain held and reserve their slots and marked capital under the existing V2 rules
capital_and_execution.capacity: existing V2 1 percent prior-session volume and amount caps
capital_and_execution.reuse: existing V2 commission, stamp tax, slippage, capacity, board-lot, limit, suspension, terminal and blocked-exit semantics without modification

universe.security_type: ordinary common A shares on SSE or SZSE only
universe.decision_status: listed, not delisted, non-ST, non-suspended, not limit-up and not limit-down on D
universe.liquidity: median CNY amount over accepted sessions D-20 through D-1 is at least CNY 20000000
universe.execution_panel: all selected names require a positive finite CNY D+1 open, complete limits, non-suspended state, prior-session capacity fields and SHARES position units
universe.skip_rule: if fewer than 500 names are eligible, fewer than 15 names satisfy the variant, or any selected execution panel is incomplete, the whole decision is invalid with no replacement

feature_contract.activity_baseline: median amount over the 20 accepted sessions D-20 through D-1; every value and the median must be positive and finite
feature_contract.availability: all signal, status, calendar and execution identities used at D must be available no later than the frozen decision or execution cutoff; missing or late identity fails closed

selection.rank: ascending market-relative return, then ascending ts_code
selection.comparators: the two unconditioned variants are bounded matched comparators and are not standalone strategy families
forbidden: alternative activity input or shock threshold

historical_test_family.order: REV10_AMOUNT_SHOCK2 then REV20_AMOUNT_SHOCK2; within each, validation then retrospective holdout; within each split, net excess versus 510300.SH then net difference versus the matched unconditioned comparator

bootstrap.series: chronologically ordered complete monthly paired net-return differences
bootstrap.lower_bound: linear quantile at 0.00625 of uncentered bootstrap mean differences

gates_per_primary_variant_and_historical: complete interval count meets the split minimum
invalid decisions and missing or nonfinite marks equal zero
annualized strategy net return at 50 bps is strictly positive
annualized strategy net return is strictly above 510300.SH net return
annualized strategy net return is strictly above its matched unconditioned comparator
Bonferroni-controlled bootstrap lower bound for mean monthly net excess versus 510300.SH is strictly above zero
Bonferroni-controlled bootstrap lower bound for mean monthly net difference versus the matched unconditioned comparator is strictly above zero
family_pass_rule: both primary shock variants must pass all seven gates in both frozen historical splits; any mandatory failure permanently closes the family

preflight.pass_rule: history exists, at least one decision exists, every decision has all four valid variants, all selected execution panels are complete, benchmark initial entry fills, unexpected exceptions equal zero, units are CNY and SHARES, and neither post-entry outcomes nor embargo or prospective data are accessed

terminal_rules_for_later_one_use_outcome.HISTORICAL_SCREENING_FAIL: close permanently with no retune, rerun, rescue filter or specialist relabel
terminal_rules_for_later_one_use_outcome.HISTORICAL_SCREENING_PASS: enter prospective Shadow and remain non-candidate
terminal_rules_for_later_one_use_outcome.INPUT_BLOCKED: repair only the input or financial-semantic defect under a child lineage
